    <item>
        <guid>nba527753</guid>
        <title>Neemias Queta: Scores 18 points with three swats</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/neemias-queta-5333</link>
        <description>Queta notched 18 points (9-10 FG), seven rebounds, four assists and three blocks in 34 minutes during Sunday's 115-101 victory over Toronto.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 9:26:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527751</guid>
        <title>Jaylen Brown: Scores game-high 26 points in win</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jaylen-brown-3894</link>
        <description>Brown posted 26 points (11-20 FG, 1-3 3Pt, 3-5 FT), six rebounds, three assists and two steals in 35 minutes during Sunday's 115-101 win over the Raptors.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 9:24:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527750</guid>
        <title>Ja'Kobe Walter: Scores 16 points with full line</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/jakobe-walter-6261</link>
        <description>Walter finished Sunday's 115-101 loss to Boston with 16 points (6-9 FG, 4-5 3Pt, 0-3 FT), two rebounds, one assist, one block and two steals in 32 minutes.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 9:23:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527747</guid>
        <title>Luka Doncic: Seeking treatment in Europe</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/luka-doncic-4396</link>
        <description>Doncic will seek specialized medical treatment in Europe for his Grade 2 left hamstring strain, Shams Charania of ESPN reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 8:00:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
    </item>
    <item>
        <guid>nba527729</guid>
        <title>Stephen Curry: Coming off bench Sunday night</title>
        <link>https://www.rotowire.com//basketball/player/stephen-curry-3014</link>
        <description>Curry (knee) will come off the bench for Sunday's game against Houston, Brett Siegel of ClutchPoints.com reports.

        Visit RotoWire.com for more analysis on this update.</description>
        <pubDate>Sun, 05 Apr 2026 6:44:00 PM PDT</pubDate>
